# Thermal Gravimetric Analysis

**Summary**: An analytical technique to study the change in mass of a material as it is heated.

---

## How It Is Used in the Thesis Collection

- [[2024-abdallah|Abdallah, 2024]] used thermal gravimetric analysis (TGA) to determine the heating properties and stability of thermochemical fluids.
